entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY AND CHANGE
entities.description: Fluctuations and long-term shifts in climate patterns affecting agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE SERVICES
entities.description: Provision of climate and weather information to support decision making

entities.name: INTELLIGENT AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS ADVISORY TOOL
entities.description: A system (ISAT) that generates and disseminates data-driven location-specific advisories

entities.name: DECISION TREE APPROACH
entities.description: A structured and systematic approach to decision making used to generate advisories

entities.name: HISTORICAL CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Past climate data used for analysis in the decision tree

entities.name: CLIMATE AND WEATHER FORECASTS
entities.description: Predictions of future weather and climate patterns used for planning

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Prevailing environmental factors affecting agricultural systems

entities.name: DATA ANALYTICS
entities.description: The process of analyzing data to implement decision trees and generate messages

entities.name: INFORMATION DISSEMINATION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems used to deliver actionable advisories to farmers via mobile devices

entities.name: MONSOON
entities.description: The seasonal weather period during which the ISAT was piloted

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The specific crop used to measure the impact of ISAT advisories

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity for the crop

entities.name: DIGITAL TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Electronic tools and data systems used to provide actionable advisories
